coding.display: CT Abdomen and Pelvis W contrast IV

code.text: CT Abdomen and Pelvis with IV Contrast

conclusion: Dilated, non-opacified appendix measuring 13 mm in diameter with periappendiceal fat stranding. Small focus of extraluminal gas adjacent to the appendiceal tip. A 2.3 cm rim-enhancing fluid collection adjacent to the cecum in the right paracolic gutter, consistent with a localized periappendiceal abscess. No free intraperitoneal air. No bowel obstruction. Impression: Perforated appendicitis with localized periappendiceal abscess.

conclusionCode.text: Perforated appendicitis with localized periappendiceal abscess
